channel.title: Thomas Mason's Website
channel.description: Since my website has a bit of an unconventional design, the purpose of this feed is to provide a sort of changelog rather than a simple list of new posts.

item.title: Rucking
item.description: I did some research about rucking, which is a form of exercise where you basically go for a walk with a weighted backpack on. This might be the only way I'll be able to get myself to do any sort of cardio. This content is from Verywell Fit.

item.title: How to save seeds
item.description: I found some nice instructions for how to save vegetable seeds at Almanac.com.

item.title: Added RSS
item.description: I added RSS to my website to serve as a changelog.
